companyName.description: company name as printed at the top

reportYear.description: the current report year (the later of the two columns)

currencyUnits.description: the amount units stated in the header (e.g. thousands of NIS)

balanceSheetLineItems.description: leaf balance-sheet line items only (assets and liabilities/equity); exclude every total/subtotal row

section.description: the Hebrew section heading the line falls under, exactly as printed in the document (e.g. נכסים for the assets section, התחייבויות והון for the liabilities-and-equity section); do not translate to English

totalAssets.description: the stated total assets for the current year

totalLiabilitiesAndEquity.description: the stated total liabilities and equity for the current year

incomeStatementLineItems.description: leaf income-statement line items only (revenue and expense lines); exclude the net-income/total row; expenses are negative

currentYearAmount.description: amount in the current-year column; expenses/deductions are negative

priorYearAmount.description: amount in the prior-year column; expenses/deductions are negative

netIncome.description: the stated net income for the current year
